summary: Medical store website for G&S MEDICAL with admin dashboard, seller management, AI assistant, contact/WhatsApp integration, and seller/customer authentication (signup & login).
architectural_notes: Admin login: email=gauravsaswade2009@gmail.com, password=p1love2g (hardcoded for demo)
Store email: gauravsaswade@gsgroupswebstore.in | CEO: Gaurav Sasvade | Co-founder: Shushant Waghmare
Contact numbers — Customer care: +91 9766343454, CEO: +91 9270556455, Co-founder: +91 9156896495 (same for WhatsApp)
imageRequirements:
## Edit Images
- Crop and reframe to a professional square headshot with a clean, slightly softened background (IMG_20250724_183425_656.webp > founder-photo.dim_400x400.jpg)

existing_features.title: Build a professional, animated public-facing homepage for G&S MEDICAL with the following sections: (1) Hero — full-width banner with the G&S Medical logo, store name 'G&S MEDICAL', tagline about trusted healthcare, and a CTA button; (2) About Us — warm, positive description of the store emphasizing quality, trust, reliability, and community health; (3) Founder & Co-Founder profiles — cards for CEO GAURAV SASVADE and Co-Founder & Director SHUSHANT WAGHMARE with flattering professional bios, titles, phone numbers, and WhatsApp links; (4) Medicines/Products section — dynamically populated from backend data; (5) Seller Directory — list of active seller profiles; (6) Contact & Customer Care section with phone (+91 9766343454), WhatsApp (+91 9766343454), CEO phone (+91 9270556455), CEO WhatsApp (+91 9270556455), Co-Founder phone (+91 9156896495), Co-Founder WhatsApp (+91 9156896495), and store email gauravsaswade@gsgroupswebstore.in; (7) Footer with store name, tagline, and key links. Use smooth scroll animations, fade-ins, and entrance transitions throughout.

Implement an Admin Dashboard accessible via a '/admin' route, protected by a login screen accepting email 'gauravsaswade2009@gmail.com' and password 'p1love2g'. The dashboard must include: (1) Medicine Manager — add, edit, delete medicines with fields for name, category, description, price, stock, image URL, availability toggle; (2) Seller Manager — view all seller profiles, add new sellers, edit seller details, toggle status (active/inactive/pending), and remove sellers; (3) Website Content Editor — edit key website sections (hero headline, about text, announcements) stored in SiteContent; (4) Dashboard overview — counts of total medicines, active sellers, pending sellers; (5) Logout button. The dashboard must be fully functional from any device/browser (no local-only restrictions).

Create seller profile pages on the public website. Each seller has a profile card visible on the Sellers section of the homepage and a dedicated seller detail page (e.g., '/sellers/:id'). Seller profiles display name, contact info, address, license number, and status badge. Only sellers with 'active' status are shown publicly. Admin can manage all sellers regardless of status from the dashboard.

Implement a floating AI Assistant chatbot widget on all public pages. The widget opens as a chat bubble in the bottom-right corner. It responds to common customer queries about medicines, store hours, ordering, and contact information using a rule-based response engine (no external AI API). It should handle FAQs such as: how to order, store location/contact, available medicines, seller registration, and escalate to customer care (+91 9766343454) for unanswered queries. Chat history is preserved during the session.

Apply a professional medical-grade visual theme across the entire website: clean white and deep emerald green primary palette with gold accent highlights, medical cross motifs, modern sans-serif typography, card-based layouts with subtle shadows, smooth hover transitions, and a trustworthy, authoritative aesthetic. Animate section entrances with fade-up and slide-in effects on scroll. Ensure the design is fully responsive for mobile, tablet, and desktop.

Create a Seller Sign Up page at route '/seller/signup'. The form must collect: Full Name, Email, Password, Confirm Password, Phone, WhatsApp Number, Address, and License Number. On successful submission, call the backend registerSeller function. Display a confirmation message that the account is pending admin approval. Link to the Seller Login page. Style consistently with the existing emerald green and gold medical theme.

Create a Seller Login page at route '/seller/login'. The form collects Email and Password, calls the backend sellerLogin function, and on success stores the session token and redirects the seller to a Seller Dashboard page (basic profile view). Display error messages for invalid credentials. Link to the Seller Sign Up page. Style consistently with the existing emerald green and gold medical theme.

Create a basic Seller Dashboard page at route '/seller/dashboard', accessible only to authenticated sellers (redirect to '/seller/login' if no valid session token). Display the seller's profile information (name, email, phone, address, license number) and their current account status badge (pending/active/inactive). Include a Logout button that clears the session and redirects to '/seller/login'.

Create a Customer Sign Up page at route '/customer/signup'. The form must collect: Full Name, Email, Password, Confirm Password, and Phone. On successful submission, call the backend registerCustomer function and redirect to the Customer Login page with a success message. Style consistently with the existing emerald green and gold medical theme.

Create a Customer Login page at route '/customer/login'. The form collects Email and Password, calls the backend customerLogin function, stores the session token on success, and redirects to the homepage. Display error messages for invalid credentials. Link to the Customer Sign Up page. Add links to Customer Login and Sign Up in the main site Navigation bar. Style consistently with the existing emerald green and gold medical theme.

Update the Admin Dashboard's Seller Manager section to display sellers registered via the self-signup flow (status 'pending', 'active', or 'inactive'). Admin must be able to approve a pending seller (change status to 'active'), deactivate a seller, and remove a seller account. Add a count of 'Pending Seller Approvals' to the Admin Dashboard overview stat cards.

Add React Query hooks in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts for all new backend functions: registerSeller, sellerLogin, getSellerByToken, logoutSeller, registerCustomer, customerLogin, getCustomerByToken, logoutCustomer. Add a useSellerAuth and useCustomerAuth hook (analogous to useAuth.ts) for managing seller and customer session tokens in localStorage respectively.
In the top navigation bar (Navigation.tsx), change the 'G&S' portion of the logo/brand text from white to black so it is clearly visible against the header background.

In frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx, ensure the 'G&S' portion of the logo/brand text is styled with a black color (e.g., text-black or #000000) so it is clearly visible against the header background. The '& S MEDICAL' portion may retain its existing styling.

In the ChatWidget or WhatsApp contact popup component, change the popup/modal box background color from white to pink (e.g., bg-pink-100 or bg-pink-200 for the container, with matching pink tones for the header and inner sections). Ensure text remains legible against the pink background.

In the public-facing website (Navigation.tsx and any other publicly visible components such as the homepage footer or any navigation links), remove or hide any visible shortcut, link, or button that directs regular visitors to the admin login page ('/admin'). The '/admin' route itself must remain functional and accessible by direct URL, but no clickable shortcut to it should be visible to public users.

In frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx, locate the main hero section's primary <h1> heading element (the first h1 inside the third content div of the first section) and change its text color from white to black.

In frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx, locate the CTA button element in the hero section identified by the XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[1]/div[3]/div[5]/a[1]/button[1] and change its background color from white to a white-pink tone (e.g., bg-pink-100 or #fff0f5). Ensure the button text remains legible against the new background.

In frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx (or whichever component renders the founders section), locate the element at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[5]/div[1]/div[2]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[2]/div[1]/img[1] and replace its src with the newly generated profile photo asset at 'frontend/public/assets/generated/founder-photo.dim_400x400.jpg'. Ensure the image renders with proper rounded/circular styling consistent with the existing founder card design.

new_feature_requests.summary: Professional animated homepage with G&S MEDICAL branding, logo, store info, and positive content about the founders
Admin dashboard with login (gauravsaswade2009@gmail.com / p1love2g), accessible from anywhere, allowing medicine management, website editing, and seller management
Seller profiles on website with admin ability to add/edit/manage sellers from dashboard
AI assistant chatbot for customer queries
Contact section with customer care, CEO, and co-founder phone and WhatsApp numbers
Custom logo for G&S MEDICAL displayed on the website with store name

Create the backend data models and actor with the following entities: (1) Medicines — id, name, category, description, price, stock, imageUrl, isAvailable; (2) Sellers — id, name, email, phone, whatsapp, address, licenseNumber, status (active/inactive/pending), joinedAt; (3) SiteContent — key/value store for editable website sections (hero text, about text, announcements, etc.); (4) AdminCredentials — hardcoded check for email 'gauravsaswade2009@gmail.com' and password 'p1love2g' returning a session token; (5) ChatMessages — id, customerQuery, botResponse, timestamp. Expose CRUD endpoints for all entities and an admin login function.
Seller signup & login pages — sellers can register to sell their products on the website, with admin able to manage registered sellers from the dashboard
Customer signup & login pages — customers can create an account and log in to the website

Extend the backend Motoko actor to support Seller account registration and authentication: add a SellerAccount type with fields (id, name, email, passwordHash, phone, whatsapp, address, licenseNumber, status: pending/active/inactive, joinedAt). Expose functions: registerSeller(name, email, password, phone, whatsapp, address, licenseNumber) → returns ok/err, sellerLogin(email, password) → returns session token or err, getSellerByToken(token) → returns seller profile, logoutSeller(token). New seller registrations default to 'pending' status and must await admin approval.

Extend the backend Motoko actor to support Customer account registration and authentication: add a Customer type with fields (id, name, email, passwordHash, phone, joinedAt). Expose functions: registerCustomer(name, email, password, phone) → returns ok/err, customerLogin(email, password) → returns session token or err, getCustomerByToken(token) → returns customer profile, logoutCustomer(token).
Change 'G&S' text color in the top/header area from white to black
Change the WhatsApp 'us' popup box color from white to pink
Hide the admin login shortcut/link from the public-facing website so it is not visible to regular visitors
Change white color to black (unspecified element — likely a text or background color change)
Change a white color element to white-pink (pinkish white tone)
